message:
feat(decision): add critical file inflation for data-loss safety gate (Plan §11)

Implement loss inflation mechanism to penalize kill-like actions when
critical files are detected. This completes the data-loss safety gate:

- Add CriticalFileInflation config with category-specific weights:
  - SQLite WAL/journal (2.0x), git locks (1.5x), git rebase (2.0x)
  - System package locks (2.5x), npm/yarn/cargo locks (1.5x)
  - Database writes (1.5x), app locks (1.0x), generic writes (0.5x)

- Hard detections: 10.0x base inflation (effectively blocks kills)
- Soft detections: 2.0x base inflation (increases caution)
- Additional per-file inflation: 2.0x (hard), 0.5x (soft)
- Maximum inflation cap: 100.0x

- Add compute_critical_file_inflation() for full audit/explainability
- Add should_block_kill() helper for robot mode hard-blocking
- Export new types from decision module

Also updates impact.rs to handle new CriticalFileCategory variants:
- GitRebase, SystemPackageLock, NodePackageLock, CargoLock

Tests: 11 new tests for inflation computation, all pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
